MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Martinovsky, of The Law Offices of Michael Martinovsky, P.C., Tel. 415.230.5360, for plaintiffs and moving party;
Antonina Belousova, in pro per, for plaintiff and responding party.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: Michael Martinovsky's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD as to PLAINTIFF ANTONINA BELAUSOVA is granted.
